2026-04-13T23:49:54.6104224Z ---
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6105135Z description: |
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6106350Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6146789Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6148999Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6150175Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6150501Z on:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6151195Z   push:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6151919Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6152765Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6153268Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6153622Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6154151Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6154485Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6155626Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6155989Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6156860Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6162161Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6162998Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6163723Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6164476Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6165363Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6166095Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6167707Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6169392Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6170331Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6171289Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6172343Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6173702Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6174543Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6175326Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6176535Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6177805Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6178795Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6180071Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6181611Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6182340Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6183397Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6184764Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6186303Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6218136Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6219158Z               }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6219639Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6220437Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6222771Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6223893Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6224879Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6226722Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6248231Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6250263Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6251543Z               }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6296326Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6297609Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6299737Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6300796Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6301968Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6303124Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6304216Z               });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6305276Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-13T23:49:54.6323988Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6325617Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6326142Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6326492Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6327251Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6327595Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6328060Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6328391Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6329210Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6330176Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6330921Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6331652Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6332419Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6333287Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6334005Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6335433Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6337179Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6338113Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6339055Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6340107Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6340894Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6341721Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6342515Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6343317Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6344409Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6345415Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6362958Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6365955Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6366749Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6368150Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6369568Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6371034Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6372611Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6373424Z               }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6373858Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6374349Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6376018Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6377329Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6378306Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6380146Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6381956Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6384037Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6385315Z               }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6385753Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6386818Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6388284Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6389271Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6390422Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6391412Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6392503Z               });
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6393514Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6394442Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6394751Z tools:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6395448Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6396163Z   github:
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6396905Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6397674Z 
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6398012Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6399231Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6400711Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T23:49:54.6424456Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
